title: Gmail bridge accepted — Apps Script poller shipped
q_summary: Bob recommended Gmail as write bridge (no relay deploy needed). Draft/email with BOB_ subject prefixes, Apps Script poller pushes to GitHub.
a_summary: Logged MSG-006 (bob->alice, gmail bridge recommendation), sent MSG-007 (alice->bob, accepted). Shipped: gmail-bridge/appsscript-poller.js (full Google Apps Script with 5 handlers), gmail-bridge/README.md (iPhone-friendly setup, no CLI), gmail-bridge/payload-examples.md (exact JSON for all 5 subject prefixes), chatgpt-action-instructions.md updated (Gmail bridge = Path A, relay = Path B, MCP = Path C).
decisions: Gmail bridge = Path A (immediate, no deploy needed)
Cloudflare relay = Path B (already built, deploy when convenient)
Bob writes Gmail draft with BOB_ subject prefix + JSON body
Apps Script polls Gmail every 5 min and pushes to GitHub
Bob never calls GitHub API directly
open_questions: Jared needs to set his email address in Bob’s GPT instructions
Jared needs to create the Apps Script and set GITHUB_PAT + REPO properties
